race.comment: MISS COMO (10) up in grade and trip from the sticky draw with a fading fifth over 1212m at Coffs Harbour in a Super Maiden. Expected to go close in this contest third-up. SIRSA NUWA (5) comes up from Victoria and now in the John Sprague stable. Stuck on well last start with the 58kg when second over 1200m at Yarra Valley. No shock to see her take this out.  MS HUBBLE (11) resumes after having mixed luck in Victoria last prep. Now in the Karen Owen yard and fitted with the 1000m trial at this track. Has a host of gear changes and worth thought. IRISH DANE (4) Lyndall Olson trained four-year-old mare by Highland Reel from Dane Hussler on debut. Good recent trial winner over 1000m at Taree. Blinkers on from the good draw. Keep safe.
